feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: >Wake up at 4PM from napsy time >Glance over at my Good Boy Points scoreboard >F…
entry.content: >Wake up at 4PM from napsy time >Glance over at my Good Boy Points scoreboard >Fuck yes, 25 pointsies! >Time to play some video gameys >Waddle downstairs to living room in my jammy wammies >Mom has her book club over, occupying valuable living room space >"Anon, we're having our weekly book meeting here, can't you go play in the playroom for a little while?" >No bitch, I saved up my Good Boy Points to play my Weegee game >"O-okay, Anon, but please try to keep it down." >Of course mommy, I'm your
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /int/ International: I really hate the United States. I have an almost bloodthirsty hatred for toward…
entry.content: I really hate the United States. I have an almost bloodthirsty hatred for towards their state. I will celebrate when they collapse.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How is game development affected by AI?

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why does having sex have to be so difficult?
entry.content: There have been several times now where Ive come across a curvy girl I couldnt have anal sex with, because of how hard it would be to talk to her, how hard it would be to keep her interested, and how hard it would be to find the right moment and way to make the move.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: It's too bloated and repetitive. After finishing the game, I didn't feel the usu…
entry.content: It's too bloated and repetitive. After finishing the game, I didn't feel the usual post game bliss, just exhausted, like I'd finished a massive chore.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Younger people stealing Millennial video games
entry.content: I am 36, work at CVS, and I have a 22yo coworker born in 2004. I know talking with your co-workers about vidya is a meme, but I do it anyway with this kid. Most of his favorite games are PS2 games like FFX and Sly Cooper. It pisses me off and I have to constantly remind him that he was born after that era and never truly experienced them, and that emulating them or buying them today doesn't count. He doesn't see an issue with it and always says shit like "well people listen to bands before their
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Cynicism of post-apocalyptic narratives
entry.content: Not sure if this belongs here or /lit/, /his/, /v/ or even /pol/, but have you noticed how cynical all post-apocalyptic narratives are about the human nature and people's relationship with the authority? In every post-apocalyptic narrative it is expected that once the government begins to crumble, humans start forming cannibal rape gangs. Why is it that the state is necessary for humans to form a morally coherent society? Does morality come from the government authority? Now, I am not an anarchi
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Is there a good explanation for why CGI has taken a million steps backwards sinc…
entry.content: Is there a good explanation for why CGI has taken a million steps backwards since 2010. The year is 2026 and nobody gives a fuck about movies anymore including the people that make them. But CGI just seems like something that's impossible to make go backwards. Despite that, it has. There's bad CGI and then there's "bad CGI". Jurassic Park is objectively "bad CGI". It was mind boggling when it came out, but it's objectively bad because when you compare it to modern technology it does not look rea
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Remember when Macintosh computers were aimed at the wishy-washy legacyfagging crowd?
entry.content: Copland crashed and burned, because it turns out you can't build something from scratch if you're integrating the components that fucked things up in the first place. Maybe Dave Cutler had a point! NT has weathered 30+ years of shit on top, and it's likely the last bastion of Windows' stability.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Pokemon Fat and Expansion Thread
entry.content: Pokemon Fat and Expansion Thread: Summer Soaks Edition Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/82525772 Bring your fat and inflated Pokemon and Pokegirl content. Art, stories, greentexts, edits, all are welcome! Drawfriends and writefriends are always welcome here as well. We love seeing all sorts of requests and OC! And let's take a cue from our fellow threads, yeah? Don't start arguments, don't shitpost, don't imagedump, and don't bring drama with you. TotT: Groudon's Drought is
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Don't fall for them
entry.content: The Jews have been trying to make white men become faggots and trannies so that they would act passively when niggers, jeets, and muzzies interbred with white women. Also, interbreeding is a tool used by Jews to exterminate the white race. Therefore, homosexuality should be illegal in all western countries. Immigrants from third world countries, should be sent back to their shitholes.

entry.title: /int/ International: Japan appreciation post
entry.content: https://www.mv.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr top_en/index.html We should appreciate japan more. They are the only country giving aid without scamming us or getting anything in return. Check out the embassy website. They donate lots of equipment, constantly. They had actually donated a bariatric chamber, that the sifain could have used to save that diver during the cave rescue thing. Its the kind of thing they should have had on the diving boat. but alas it was nowhere to be seen. Everything is probably s
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: The Unity will bring about the master race. Master! Master! One able to survive,…
entry.content: The Unity will bring about the master race. Master! Master! One able to survive, or even thrive, in the wasteland. As long as there are differences, we will tear ourselves apart fighting each other. We need one race. Race! Race! One goal. Goal! Goal! One people . . . to move forward to our destiny. Destiny

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Out of over 100 characters only a small handful are actually viable if you wann…
entry.content: >Out of over 100 characters only a small handful are actually viable if you wanna play above the lowest rank >Out of those handful 2-3 are clearly Dev pets and never get nerfed >If you want to play them you need to invest hundreds of hours of our ever fleeting lives into mastering them >Once you do they'll finally get nerfed into obscurity and you have to start over I don't understand people who play the ASSFAGGOTS genre. Getting an actual job would be less time intensive and more rewarding.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

Fuck the Deutsche Bahn. FUCK

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The MAID transport train dropped you into the outskirts of the containment zone …
entry.content: The MAID transport train dropped you into the outskirts of the containment zone this morning. You’ve been wandering the hollow streets of the repurposed town for hours. The outskirts are completely empty and silent and the buildings slowly decaying. Eventually you spot a young man, barefoot (pic related), leaning against the wall of an abandoned garage. He laughs and informs you that the cleanup crews never pass through this part of town and if you want to get put down, you need to go to the tow
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: microsofts CSAM problem
entry.content: https://itsfoss.com/news/windows-11 -cam-bug/ windows 11 is capable of filling entire 500GB NVME SSD due to a bug CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal.exe fills entire drive if you not careful But it can still be deleted Press Win + I, go to System > Recovery, and click Restart now next to Advanced startup. When it restarts, navigate to Troubleshoot > Advanced options > Startup Settings > Restart, and press 4 or F4 to enter Safe Mode. Delete the Folder: Open File Explorer and go to C:\ProgramData\Micr
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /b/ Random: My story
entry.content: ve never posted anything like this before and I’m still not sure I should, but I’m 21 and I’ve been carrying this since I was a kid and I need to say it out loud somewhere. When I was between 4 and 12 my uncle used to watch me a lot on weekends. At first it was just him being “affectionate” in ways that felt wrong, then it turned into him touching me under my clothes, making me touch him, and eventually full sex. He would take me into his room or the basement, tell me it was our secret, that I w
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /news/ News: Juan For the Road
entry.content: https://www.cbsnews.com/news/maine- shooting-ice-biddeford/ A person was killed during a shooting in Maine involving U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement on Monday morning, state House Speaker Ryan Fecteau said. The Maine Immigrants' Rights Coalition identified the person who was shot as a 26-year-old Colombian man who was authorized to work in the U.S. and had been issued a Social Security number. The police department in Biddeford, Maine, said in a statement that it responded to an inciden
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News
